Actionable Insights

AI-powered recommendations based on waste patterns

High Pasta Waste

42%

Pasta waste is at 42%. Consider reducing portion sizes or offering half portions.

Rice Efficiency

15%

Rice has consistently low waste (15%). Consider scaling up production.

Friday Peak

425 lbs

Friday has the highest waste volume. Review menu variety for end-of-week fatigue.

Lunch Time Pattern

35% higher

Lunch consistently shows higher waste than dinner. Consider adjusting lunch portions.

Weekend Improvement

-45%

Weekend waste is 45% lower than weekdays. Replicate weekend practices.
